channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.description: By Business Reporter | Econet Wireless Zimbabwe has launched a new XtraData Bundles product, promising customers up to twice as much data... Continue reading "Econet Launches New Data Product Amid Persistent Network Complaints" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: RBZ Governor Rules Out Forced Conversion Of US Dollar Savings Into ZiG During Mono-Currency Transition @ReserveBankZIM
item.description: RBZ Governor Clarifies Mono-Currency Plan, Rules Out Forced Conversion Of US Dollar Savings Zimbabweans holding US dollar balances will not be forced to convert their savings into ZiG when the country eventually moves to a mono-currency system, the Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe (RBZ) has said. RBZ Governor Dr John Mushayavanhu moved to calm concerns surrounding [...] The post RBZ Governor Rules Out Forced Conversion Of US Dollar Savings Into ZiG During Mono-Currency Transition appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Benjani’s son joins Highlanders @bulawayo24
item.description: Highlanders have completed the signing of winger Benjani Junior Mwaruwari as the Bulawayo giants continue strengthening their squad ahead of the remainder of the Castle Lager Premier Soccer League sea... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: 31 July National Shutdown: The CIO Warnings That Made Home Affairs Minister Kazembe Kazembe Panic!
item.description: HARARE – The corridors of the Mukwati Building in Harare, usually a hive of bureaucratic indifference, have lately been thick with a different kind of energy: a palpable, sweating anxiety. At the centre of this storm is Home Affairs and Cultural Heritage Minister Kazembe Kazembe. Publicly, he is the picture of iron-fisted confidence, dismissing talk [...] The post 31 July National Shutdown: The CIO Warnings That Made Home Affairs Minister Kazembe Kazembe Panic! first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: ZRP Statement Reveals Chilling New Details In Eastview Children’s Deaths @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: ZRP Releases More Details On Eastview Tragedy That Claimed Two Young Lives A Zimbabwe Republic Police (ZRP) statement has revealed more details about the tragic Eastview, Mabvuku incident in which two young children died after a room they were sleeping in was allegedly set on fire. Police say the incident followed a domestic dispute in [...] The post ZRP Statement Reveals Chilling New Details In Eastview Children’s Deaths appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: The CAB3 Betrayal: Which Opposition Senators ‘Sold Out’ the Constitution for a Mess of Pottage?
item.description: HARARE – The political landscape of Zimbabwe has been irrevocably altered by the recent signing into law of the Constitutional Amendment Bill No. 3 (CAB3) by President Emmerson Mnangagwa. While state-controlled media outlets have lauded this development as a significant “milestone” for governance, an investigative deep dive into the corridors of the Senate reveals a [...] The post The CAB3 Betrayal: Which Opposition Senators ‘Sold Out’ the Constitution for a Mess of Pottage? first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe’s Blueberry Boom Set to Bear Record Exports @263Chat
item.description: Zimbabwe’s blueberry industry is poised for its biggest export season yet, with one of the country’s leading producers forecasting a sharp increase in overseas sales as global demand for the fruit continues to rise. Wiserow Private Limited, an agro-processing company based about 20 kilometres outside [...] The post Zimbabwe’s Blueberry Boom Set to Bear Record Exports appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: China’s new AI model halts new subscriptions as demand swamps capacity
item.description: HONG KONG — The new, powerful Chinese artificial intelligence model Kimi K3, which has caused a stir in the U.S. tech industry, has suspended new subscriptions after a flood in demand overwhelmed capacity within days of the launch. The development highlighted challenges faced by Chinese AI models in serving a growing user base at home [...] The post China’s new AI model halts new subscriptions as demand swamps capacity appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Former Bulawayo deputy mayor and CCC heavyweight Gift Banda joins Zanu-PF at Gwanda rally @nehandaradio @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: Former CCC politician Gift Banda has officially joined Zanu-PF, ending his opposition ties as his political switch revives attention on his controversial legal battles. The post Former Bulawayo deputy mayor and CCC heavyweight Gift Banda joins Zanu-PF at Gwanda rally appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Kunzvi Dam Nears Reality as Mega Project Promises Water, Power and Jobs @263Chat
item.description: Construction of the long-awaited Kunzvi Dam is gathering pace with the multi-million-dollar project set to transform water security for Harare and surrounding districts while opening up new opportunities for irrigation, power generation and rural economic development. Speaking during a media tour of the site, Assistant [...] The post Kunzvi Dam Nears Reality as Mega Project Promises Water, Power and Jobs appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Zimbabwe’s ZiG Ambition Faces Its Biggest Test: Can Policy Outpace the Strength of the US Dollar? @ReserveBankZIM
item.description: HARARE – Zimbabwe’s ambition to transition towards a single domestic currency is gaining momentum on paper, with the Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe (RBZ) arguing that key economic conditions required for the eventual exclusive use of the Zimbabwe Gold (ZiG) currency are gradually being achieved. However, beneath the policy optimism lies a more complex market reality: [...] The post Zimbabwe’s ZiG Ambition Faces Its Biggest Test: Can Policy Outpace the Strength of the US Dollar? appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail
